title: AEX Premium Collection Teaspoons, 18/0 Stainless Steel, Round Edge Plain Pattern Cutlery, Tea Spoons with Mirror Polished Finish– Pack of 6.[Silver]
features: Premium Collection: Elevate your tea time with AEX's Premium Collection teaspoon set of 6. Crafted from durable 18/0 stainless steel, this tea spoon set offers a timeless and elegant design perfect for any occasion.

Mirror-Polished Finish: Enjoy the stunning mirror-polished finish of AEX's teaspoon 12 stainless steel. These teaspoons 6 shine with sophistication, making every sip of tea or coffee a delightful experience.

Round Edge Plain Pattern: Designed for comfort and style, AEX's round edge plain pattern coffee spoon ensures a smooth grip. These teaspoons are perfect for daily use or special gatherings, adding a touch of elegance to your table.

Durable 18/0 Stainless Steel: AEX's teaspoon set of 6 is made from high-quality 18/0 stainless steel, ensuring long-lasting durability. These spoons are resistant to rust and corrosion, making them an excellent addition to your kitchen.

Versatile and Functional: Ideal for various uses, these tea spoons can be used as dessert spoons, coffee spoons, or even as a replacement for plastic teaspoons. This spon set is perfect for any dining occasion, from casual to formal.
description: Product Description Stainless Steel Tea Spoon teaspoons set of 6 AEX 6 pieces round teaspoon Set are made of high quality stainless steel, rust resistant and anti-corrosion, durable enough to serve you many years. Dessert spoons care great for daily use, such as stirring sugar, cream, or milk, suitable for tea, cafe, ice cream, dessert or appetizers. Great to replace the old or missing forks and also a nice gift for friend and family. Stainless Steel Teaspoons Set Of 6 HIGH-GRADE MIRROR POLISH Our hot chocolate spoons have exceptionally smooth edges and high-quality mirror finish, so they will not hurt you when used. Our polished surfaces will remain gleaming even after years of use. STAINLESS STEEL MATERIAL This cutlery set is designed for long-term usage and is composed of superior stainless steel. It has a solid structure, is rust-resistant, and will last for many years. EROGOMIC DESIGN The classic and beautiful shape compliments existing kitchenware, and the super shine and classic design lend a rich feel, making it great for all of your needs. These chocolate spoons are suitable and easy for everyday use, as well as any casual and formal gatherings, parties, and business events, including picnics. Spoons can properly complement different dishes, making it easier to eat items like paella and fruit, mashed potatoes or muesli and cocoa chocolate. They are also ideal for rice, cereal, soups and all other eating demands. Suitable for both adults and children!
